div.div: 予算超過時のアクション（DS-NFR-PERF-013）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 958px; height: 1px; padding-top: 677px; margin-left: 62px;

div.div: ・業務 200ms 超過 → Rust 実装プロファイリング。ZEN Engine / Decision API では LRU ヒット率 95% 死守。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 958px; height: 1px; padding-top: 705px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ・Dapr 80ms 超過 → Go ファサードの middleware 順序と mTLS ハンドシェイク（Istio Ambient）を再計測。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 958px; height: 1px; padding-top: 733px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ・OTel 20ms 超過 → tail-based sampling 保存率を 10% → 5% へ絞込み、Collector サイドカーのキュー上限見直し。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 958px; height: 1px; padding-top: 761px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ・監査 50ms 超過 → Kafka producer の linger.ms / batch.size を再調整、acks=1 固定、同期 flush の誤設定を除去。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 958px; height: 1px; padding-top: 789px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ・NW/DB 150ms 超過 → Connection Pool の再利用率、Valkey Sentinel の Replica 分散、PG EXPLAIN を確認。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 958px; height: 1px; padding-top: 827px; margin-left: 62px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ・p99 が 80% (400ms) で Warning、100% (500ms) で SEV2、3 週連続超過で容量計画レビュー強制起動。
